vocab.example: The biggest challenge was finishing the project on time.
vocab.example_vi: Thử thách lớn nhất là hoàn thành dự án đúng hạn.

vocab.example: We had a very tight deadline for that project.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có hạn chót rất gấp cho dự án đó.

vocab.example: I was chosen to lead a project with five members.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi được chọn dẫn dắt một dự án với năm thành viên.

vocab.example: We had to solve a problem with a late supplier.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi phải giải quyết vấn đề với nhà cung cấp giao trễ.

vocab.example: The result was a twenty percent increase in sales.
vocab.example_vi: Kết quả là doanh số tăng hai mươi phần trăm.

vocab.example: I collaborated closely with the design team.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội thiết kế.

vocab.example: The main lesson learned was to plan earlier.
vocab.example_vi: Bài học chính rút ra là nên lập kế hoạch sớm hơn.

vocab.example: I'm really proud of how the team handled it.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi thực sự tự hào về cách cả đội đã xử lý việc đó.

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Hoa, can you describe a memorable project you led a project on?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes, last year I led a project to launch a new product within a tight deadline.

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: What was the biggest challenge you faced?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: The biggest challenge was solving a problem with a late supplier two weeks before launch.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I collaborated with another supplier and we still met the deadline.

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: What was the result, and what did you learn?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: The result was a successful launch, and the lesson learned was to always have a backup plan. I'm really proud of that project.

questions.q: What was the memorable project about?
What lesson did Hoa learn from the project?
options: To always have a backup plan

shadowing: I led a project to launch a new product last year.
The biggest challenge was solving a problem with a supplier.
I collaborated closely with another team to meet the deadline.
The result was a successful launch for the whole company.
The lesson learned was to always have a backup plan.
